phrases.en: Dan drove slowly down the busy street.
phrases.zh: 丹沿着繁忙的街道慢慢开车。

phrases.en: He looked for an empty parking space.
phrases.zh: 他寻找一个空着的停车位。

phrases.en: Finally, he spotted an open spot near the corner.
phrases.zh: 终于，他看到拐角附近有一个空位。

phrases.en: He turned on his signal to warn the cars behind him.
phrases.zh: 他打开转向灯，提醒后面的车。

phrases.en: He stopped just past the empty spot.
phrases.zh: 他停在那个空位刚过去一点的地方。

phrases.en: He carefully backed into the parking space.
phrases.zh: 他小心地倒车进了停车位。

phrases.en: He straightened the wheels so the car sat evenly.
phrases.zh: 他把车轮回正，让车停得端正。

phrases.en: He shifted the gear into park.
He pulled up the hand brake firmly.
He turned off the engine and took out the key.
phrases.zh: 他关掉发动机，拔出了钥匙。

phrases.en: He fed some coins into the parking meter.
phrases.zh: 他往停车计时器里投了几枚硬币。

phrases.en: He got out and closed the door.
Then, he locked the doors and walked away.
phrases.zh: 然后，他锁上车门，走开了。
